'''radhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kadaitcha|kadaitcha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kadaitcha|kadaitcha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| radhaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rædhækæth|rædhækæth]] || [[word:rædhækæj|rædhækæj]] || [[word:rædhækæsh|rædhækæsh]] || [[word:rædhækæ|rædhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhadhakath|radhadhakath]] || [[word:radhadhakaj|radhadhakaj]] || [[word:radhadhakash|radhadhakash]] || [[word:radhadhaka|radhadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhakath|radhakath]] || [[word:radhakaj|radhakaj]] || [[word:radhakash|radhakash]] || [[word:radhaka|radhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhafkath|radhafkath]] || [[word:radhafkaj|radhafkaj]] || [[word:radhafkash|radhafkash]] || [[word:radhafkaf|radhafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:radhakatha|radhakatha]] || [[word:radhakaja|radhakaja]] || [[word:radhakasha|radhakasha]] || [[word:radhakaka|radhakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:radhakath|radhakath]] || [[word:radhakaj|radhakaj]] || [[word:radhakash|radhakash]] || [[word:radhaka|radhaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:radhakathal|radhakathal]] || [[word:radhakajal|radhakajal]] || [[word:radhakashal|radhakashal]] || [[word:radhakakal|radhakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:radhakathatha|radhakathatha]] || [[word:radhakajaja|radhakajaja]] || [[word:radhakashasha|radhakashasha]] || [[word:radhakaka|radhakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:radhakathan|radhakathan]] || [[word:radhakajan|radhakajan]] || [[word:radhakashan|radhakashan]] || [[word:radhakakan|radhakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:radhakathaoro|radhakathaoro]] || [[word:radhakajaoro|radhakajaoro]] || [[word:radhakashaoro|radhakashaoro]] || [[word:radhakakaoro|radhakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
